task_objective: Make the conflict resolution modal default OK action dismiss safely instead of restoring the backup save.
design_decisions: Changed ConflictResolutionModal ConfirmModal onOK from choosing restore_backup to dismissing safely.
Kept the explicit Keep Local Save and Restore Backup Save buttons as the only resolution actions.
Preserved the existing null dismissal path so handleAppStart records conflict_unresolved and resumes the game process through the existing finally block.
Used a static frontend regression test because the repository does not currently include a React interaction test harness.
Made no changes to backend APIs, TypeScript result types, or dependencies.

results.red_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_frontend_static.py -k conflict failed before implementation because onOK={dismiss} was missing.
results.targeted_test: ./run.sh uv run pytest tests/test_frontend_static.py -k conflict passed after implementation.
results.ruff_format: ./run.sh uv run ruff format . reformatted tests/test_frontend_static.py.
results.type_check: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed.
results.full_tests: ./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 316 tests.
